channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken Road Surface, 19th March
item.description:
I reported this broken road service on Tuesday 17th March under report No. 9119721 and it was reported fixed the same day however 3 sections of the road have not been fixed as you can see from the photos and still prevent a danger to road users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 336, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No light fitted on lamppost yet., 19th March
item.description:
This lamppost was place here ages ago and yet still hasn’t had the light fitted on top can it be fitted please . It’s near 139 Sevenoaks Way and just before the Tesco Express petrol station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox found in the middle of the road, 19th March
item.description:
A dead fox was found in the middle of the road, this has since been picked up and bagged by the Royal Greenwich Trust School staff. The dead animal will need to be collected from the school premises.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple red drapes hung on graves and trees, 19th March
item.description:
Someone has hung multiple (7+) red drapes or curtains from the trees and graves in the cemetery. This is a returning issue from a previous report, that was referred by you to the Parks department who cleared it a few days later.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abney Park Cemetery, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood rubbish, 19th March
item.description:
Rubbish wood on street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped children scooter outside house, 19th March
item.description:
Someone’s dumped a child scooter outside my house. I also have the ring footage of the person dumping it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Place Farm Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars dumped, 19th March
item.description:
On the estate we seem to be having a state of cars being dumped by a guy and using it as a business he is using car parks that are for residential only and also on the road car parking spaces we see him nearly every day he takes the number plates off the cars so they can’t be unidentified
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornwallis Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches on stairway, 19th March
item.description:
This has been like this for a long time the tree branches are getting lower it needs cutting back at night it’s a very nice walk as you can see much and it’s not safe specially for kids please send a team asap please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Cinder Path, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th March
item.description:
Fly tipping again. Sofa blocking access to the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benthal Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers left on grass, 19th March
item.description:
Just some barriers left on the grass from a pavement repair job.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Dorney Rise, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Bags obstructing pavement, 19th March
item.description:
Bags obstructing pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent Litter Crisis on Bermondsey Stree, 19th March
item.description:
This photo shows the current situation on Bermondsey Street, where rubbish bags are left piled on the pavement and spilling into the road. This is not an isolated incident — the same conditions can be seen across the entire street, with waste, food debris, and torn bags attracting birds and creating a serious hygiene issue. Despite multiple reports, there has been no visible improvement. The problem is ongoing and clearly not being managed effectively. Immediate and consistent action is needed to address what has become a persistent public health concern.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106,108,110, Bermondsey Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish and boxes left on pavement, 19th March
item.description:
Household items and rubbish and boxes west pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 19th March

There is a dead fox along the cycle lane.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath

item.title: Food truck and restaurant rubbish, 19th March
item.description:
I know multiple neighbours have reported this. We have a local food truck business and restaurant that dumps its commercial waste—including chemical containers, oil bins, and rotting food. This is attracting rats, and they are filling all of the recycling and garbage bins.”

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Bridge Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornwallis Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is graffiti all over the bus stop and seating, 19th March
item.description:
There is offensive words and tag all on the seating aswell as the glass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossrail Path, Woolwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: Local residents leaving rubbish front of properties, 19th March
item.description:
Ongoing issue with local resident leaving rubbish front of property all week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
